title: Set landing page theme background to red with readable foreground

requirements.summary: Update theme background token so bg-background renders as red in both light and dark mode.
acceptanceCriteria: On the landing page, the full-page background is red (covers the entire viewport).
Switching between light and dark mode does not change the background away from red.

file_operations.description: Update the CSS variable backing Tailwind `bg-background` (the `--background` token) to a red OKLCH value in both `:root` and `.dark` so the background remains red regardless of mode.

requirements.summary: Adjust theme foreground/muted variables to keep landing page text readable on the red background.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero title, subtitle, header links, and footer text have sufficient contrast and are comfortably readable on the red background.

file_operations.description: Adjust theme tokens used by `text-foreground`, `text-muted-foreground`, and related contrast-affecting variables (e.g., border/ring if needed) so header, hero, and footer text remains readable against the red `--background` while keeping the background red in both modes.
